data.title: Applied Digital Likely To Report Wider Q3 Loss; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: Applied Digital Corporation (NASDAQ: APLD) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on April 8, after the market closes. Analysts predict a loss of 21 cents per share for the Dallas-based company, compared to a loss of 8 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue stands at $78.48 million, with a reported revenue of $52.92 million in the previous year. Applied Digital recently made changes to its data center lease agreements with CoreWeave, Inc (NASDAQ: CRWV) and introduced new credit support mechanisms linked to these agreements. The company's shares closed at $24.56, marking a 0.3% increase. For further details, the full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CS Analytical to Exhibit at Interphex 2026 - Highlighting Expanded Service Offering
data.description: On April 6, 2026, CS Analytical revealed their enhanced service portfolio, incorporating Raw Material and Excipient testing along with USP and EP Gas Testing, and Micro Testing services encompassing USP 87 biological reactivity and USP 788 particle size testing. This expansion significantly broadens their offerings and signifies a strategic move in the field.

data.title: AVAX price surges 6.7% to $9.40, targeting $10.35-$12.50 range as bullish momentum for Avalanche continues. RSI at 53.52 neutral. Key resistance at $9.79.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Avalanche (AVAX) has experienced a notable increase of 6.7%, reaching a price of $9.40. Analysts are now setting their sights on price targets between $10.35 and $12.50. The technical indicators reveal a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 53.52, with a significant resistance level at $9.79 in the near future.

data.title: UniAthena Powers 5M+ Global Learners with Accessible Education
data.description: UniAthena's platform for Short Courses is making a significant impact with more than 5 million learners from over 190 countries benefitting from accessible professional development opportunities. With a selection of 750+ free courses available, the platform aims to enhance the skills of individuals in the global workforce. In the latest report from OXFORD, England on April 6, 2026, UniAthena proudly announced that they have achieved over 5 million enrollments, showcasing the widespread reach and effectiveness of their program.

data.title: Polkadot price at $1.27, indicating bearish trend. Analysts predict recovery to $1.50 by mid-2026 with RSI at 38.49. Key resistance at $1.31.
data.description: The current trading price of Polkadot is $1.27, displaying a bearish trend. However, analysts predict a possible increase to $1.50 by mid-2026. Technical analysis indicates a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 38.49, with significant resistance at $1.31.
